name: Szechwan Bean Curd
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Bean curd (tofu), cut into 1/2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place ground beef, green onions, and garlic in a nonstick skillet and cook, stirring quickly, until beef is browned.
2. Stir in chicken broth, soy sauce, chili sauce, oils, and red pepper flakes.
3. Mix cornstarch with cold water.
4. Add the cornstarch mixture to the skillet. Cook, stirring constantly, until the sauce thickens.
5. Gently stir in the bean curd. Continue cooking over medium heat for 3 minutes.
Note: Sesame oil and hot oil are available in Oriental sections of food markets and in specialty stores.
